reasoning_chain_text: 1. For Texas counties in program years 2015-16, 2016-17, 2017-18, and 2018-19, identify the top five counties by total lunch serves in the Seamless Summer Option program and keep the counties that qualify every year.
2. For the counties kept in step 1, compute total day-care-home meal reimbursements for 2018-19 and 2020-21, then keep the two counties with the largest percentage decreases.
3. For the two counties kept in step 2, compute total child-center enrollment in 2018-19 and 2019-20 and keep the county with the higher average enrollment across those two years.
4. Using the county identified in step 3, determine its county seat.
5. Using that county seat, determine the coast it is located on.
original_final_question: Across years 2015-16 t0 2018-19, which Texas county is consistently in the top five for total lunch serves in Seamless Summer Option program? Among those counties, identify the two with the largest percentage decreases in child & adult care food program's total reimbursements from 2018-19 to 2020-21, then pick the one with the higher average child center enrollment across 2018-19 and 2019-20. For that county, what coast is its county seat located on? Return the coast name only. Your response should be in the format [Answer].
original_reasoning_chain: Node 1 (2015-2016): top five LunchTotal counties -> {Harris, Hidalgo, Dallas, Cameron, El Paso}
Node 2 (2016-2017): top five LunchTotal counties -> {Hidalgo, Harris, Dallas, Cameron, Bexar}
Node 3 (2017-2018): top five LunchTotal counties -> {Hidalgo, Harris, Dallas, Cameron, Bexar}
Node 4 (2018-2019): top five LunchTotal counties -> {Hidalgo, Harris, Dallas, Bexar, Cameron}
HOP 2 (d=2, CACFP day care homes reimbursements 2018-2019 vs 2020-2021 - nodes 5-6):
Percent decreases: Hidalgo -19.26%, Cameron -15.92%, Dallas -15.58%, Harris -13.69% -> two largest decreases {Hidalgo, Cameron}
HOP 3 (d=2, CACFP child centers EnrollmentQty 2018-2019 vs 2019-2020 - nodes 7-8):
Average EnrollmentQty: Cameron 4,348,464.5 vs Hidalgo 1,569,466.5 -> Cameron County
Node 9: Cameron County seat is Brownsville
Node 10: Brownsville is on the Gulf Coast
